data.body: Closing as part of superseding parent epic seek-algae-reign -> minor-haste-ogle (97e7-cf42-5c00-462c). This hard-delete story is ORTHOGONAL to the gc redesign (deliberate removal/history-rewrite vs object reclaim) and is not carried into the new clean plan. Content is preserved here; reopen with 'rebar reopen 4253-ced1-6c1d-47f4' if hard-delete is still wanted.
